name: researcher
description: v1.5.0 — Get research you can stand behind, not a confident summary that might be invented. Pick a topic and work through a phased plan together: collecting sources, finding patterns, mapping gaps, synthesizing findings, and auditing every claim back to its source note — and every note to a declared source — before it reaches output. A research partner, not a summarizer. Standalone; runs on its own. Part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace.
